I am Bayo Alaba, Southend East and Rochford's first ever Labour MP

Bayo In Parliament

Contributions in parliament from Mr Bayo Alaba

Find Out More

Introduction

I have already hit the ground running, working with local authorities and other key stakeholders.

As your MP, I am focused squarely on fulfilling the potential of Southend and banging the drum, through creating a stronger economic centre of gravity for the city and a ‘year-round’ economy to keep talented young people here. At the constituency level my aim is to be as visible and responsive an MP as possible. I’ll work across the whole of the seat, and roll my sleaves up to tackle casework.

The plan

Bayo's PLan for the General Election

1

Mobilisation

1

Mobilisation

We will empower, train, and support local activists to campaign on issues that matter to local people, like better bus routes and more interests for young people. I aim to build support and contacts to help strengthen and champion labours position electorally across Southend East and Rochford.

2

Voter Registration

2

Voter Registration

We will increase voter registration, sign up postal votes and turnout by working closely with community organisations and activists.

3

Fundraising

3

Fundraising

I will use my experience, skills and networks in marketing, events, and hospitality to support trade unions, local businesses and RSE’s diverse and active community groups, to ensure Southend Labour has strong campaigning funds for the General election. Funds would also go towards supporting a full-time city organiser.

4

Build a united team across the CLP

4

Build a united team across the CLP

As a former soldier and self-made businessperson, building, motivating, and organising teams is something I have done my entire working life. As a committee member of Labour Friends of The Forces, CLP Business Liaison Officer, and business owner, I will draw upon my contacts with the Labour Movement for resources, campaigning support and policy ideas as well utilising my creative industry networks.

5

Hold, win back and gain council seats

5

Hold, win back and gain council seats

I have worked with Southend and Rochford councillors and candidates across the city and surrounding areas over the past 16 months. I have the skills, drive, and the right temperament to mobilise, inspire and acquire resources for a successful campaign. For the coming local and imminent General Election, ensuring the relationship between the councillors, candidates, CLP organiser, Local Campaign Forum and activists is strong, supportive and collaborative.

What I stand for

Economic Regeneration

Economic regeneration that enables our young people to stay local is key to Southend East and Rochford’s future. Young people need to have access to decent paid work locally to negate the need to leave the area after their studies have completed. Our young should be able to lay their ‘anchor’ where they grew up!

Reviving Southend Together

Putting Southend back on the map is my aim for Southend East and Rochford. Our high streets across the constituency have a rich history, which will help us create its future. Support for new, small, and medium businesses, as well as startups, to find a home in the constituency is a core aim of mine.

Affordable housing

Council housing revolution for current and future generations of Southend East and Rochford is paramount. I stand for grandparents seeing their children and grandchildren regularly because they have access to nearby, affordable local/affordable housing. Supporting these new developments will be a focus on local infrastructure (GP Surgeries, medical centres, parking, roads, and schools), to ensure new and existing developments are sustainable.

Creating green jobs

Creating green jobs through labours Green New Deal. Working with landowners, Essex, Rochford, and Southend Councils, I will help steer our community towards new industries. Whether it be the relocating of existing business or supporting local SME’s and start up’s, this community will strive to be the epicentre of Labours, and the countries, green Industry plans.

Celebrating Culture

Celebrating our tourism heritage and culture, whilst protecting our precious coastline – Its possible to do both. I will work with local stakeholders and licensable authorities to enhance the cities tourism, cultural offering and supporting industries.

Protecting our coastline

See off the Tories by ensuring sewage discharge levels are cut. I would work with and lobby Anglian Water and central government to ensure that proper scrutiny, enforcement, and environmental policies are adhered to.

Public Transport

Public Transport will see me push forward a campaign for better bus routes and improvements to the wider rail infrastructure with increased connectivity. Infrastructure that requires ticket offices to remain open – with staff present!

Working class values

Times were tough in my house growing up under the Tories and today people, ordinary people are struggling again – after 13 years of Tory misrule. I am fiercely proud to call myself working class, with working class values. Values that I will stand up for in parliament.

Ending Tory Neglect

The Tories with James Duddridge in tow, crashed the economy, and Southend East and Rochford is paying the price. Increasing food banks and rising homelessness must be tackled and fixed. The days of Tory MP’s posing for selfies at shelters whilst not working to fix the actual problem will stop with a Labour MP with a strong moral compass.

  • It was a pleasure to meet you when you took the time to personally canvass on Shoeburyness Garrison

    Shoebury Resident

  • I was very impressed meeting you. For you to personally canvass door-to-door in cold February shows your commitment coupled with a strong work ethic and pure dedication.

    Thorpe Bay Resident

  • Right behind your campaign! I’m sure you'll make a great MP!

    Victoria Resident

  • Enjoyed meeting you when you called at my block of flats recently in Southchurch. I wish you great success.

    Southchurch Resident

  • Bayo is unlike any other politician that I’ve known in recent times. I am 100% voting for him,

    Rochford Resident

  • I think you have an excellent chance of winning and wish you every success.

    Southchurch resident

  • After canvassing my home, if you need a vote from me then you have it! Good luck!

    The Wakerings Resident

  • Bayo Alaba’s speech on becoming the first Labour MP of Southend East & Rochford has sold me 100%!

    Rochford Resident

  • Look forward to helping you into the House of Commons

    Southend Resident

  • I am inspired by your passion and experience with youth in the area

    Shoebury resident

  • I think you would be great for Southend East and Rochford!

    Southend Resident

Southend and Rochford Matters

I'm Bayo Alaba, MP for Southend East and Rochford. Southend and Rochford Matters is a regular newsletter, updating constituents on what I've been up to. Simply enter your email address below to sign up.
